title: PRD-033: Role-Based Configurations
description: Enable teams to define role-based tool requirements that automatically provision different toolsets based on a developer's role

overview.problem: Teams have diverse roles with different tool requirements. Currently must create separate configs, include all tools for everyone, or let developers manually customize.
overview.solution: Single team config with [roles.*] sections defining tool sets per role. Developers declare their role in local config.
goals: Role definitions with named tool sets
Role assignment via role = 'name' in config
Role discovery via jarvy roles list/show commands
Role comparison via jarvy roles diff command

userStories.title: Role Definitions
userStories.description: As a team lead, I want to define roles with specific tool sets so that each developer gets the right tools for their job.

userStories.title: Role Assignment
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to declare my role so that I get the appropriate tools without manual configuration.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Role tools merge with base tools
Personal tools add to role tools
jarvy config show --resolved shows role source

userStories.title: Role Inheritance
userStories.description: As a team lead, I want roles to inherit from other roles so that I can build hierarchies like junior-frontend extends frontend.

userStories.title: Role Discovery Commands
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to list and explore available roles so that I know my options.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: jarvy roles list shows all roles
jarvy roles show <name> shows role details

userStories.title: Role Comparison
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to compare roles so that I understand differences before switching.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: jarvy roles diff --current <other> compares to current role

userStories.title: Role Override
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to temporarily use a different role for testing or one-off tasks.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: --dry-run with role shows what would change

implementationTasks.description: Add role information to config show --resolved
Write unit tests for role resolution

types.RoleDefinition: Struct with description, extends, tools fields
types.RoleAssignment: Enum for single or multiple role assignment
types.RoleResolver: Struct with roles HashMap, visited HashSet, depth counter
types.ResolvedRole: Struct with name, description, tools HashMap

algorithms.inheritance: Depth-first resolution with cycle detection via visited set

configExamples.teamConfig:
[roles.frontend]
description = "Frontend development stack"
tools = ["node", "bun", "pnpm"]

[roles.frontend.tools]
node = "20"
bun = "latest"

risks.risk: Role proliferation - teams create too many roles
risks.mitigation: Best practices guide, inheritance to reduce duplication

risks.risk: Inheritance complexity - deep chains hard to understand
risks.mitigation: Max depth limit (5), --inheritance flag to visualize

risks.risk: Role conflicts - multiple roles with conflicting versions
risks.mitigation: Last role wins, clear precedence rules documented
